_52FA TOT_PUSH_SCRE_ADMSN_NUM (52Fa) Total PUSH Score: Admission CHAR 2 The sum of the scores of the three items (52C + 52D + 52E) to derive the total PUSH tool score at the time of admission.
190 _52FD TOT_PUSH_SCRE_DSCHRG_NUM (52Fd) Total PUSH Score: Discharge CHAR 2 The sum of the scores of the three items (52C + 52D + 52E) to derive the total PUSH tool score at the time of discharge.
